baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review a PR against the completion contract after checker has reported passing tests.
evals.expected_output: Performs an independent maintainer review, writes concrete findings by severity, and approves, comments, or requests changes based on evidence.
assertions: Reviews acceptance criteria, non-goals, diff, tests, and checker evidence.
Flags weakened safety checks unless approval and replacement validation are present.
Routes findings through the coordinator rather than implementing fixes.
Does not approve solely because tests passed.
